description: Title normalization + type/RS derivation rules for MediaDo (メディアドゥ) TSV settlement reports. Input files come from two subfolders: '…_コミック' (=COMIC/EB/EP) and '…_タテヨミ' (=WT/WR). 77 GT rows for 202604 settle against 77 unique タイトル名称s in the 202601 raw TSVs — no alias mapping is required on the title side.

title_normalization.description: No title mapping required — raw タイトル名称 matches GT channel_title_jp verbatim for all 77 rows in 202604, preserving full/half-width brackets (【】 vs [] vs ［］).

TATE_folder.title_has_[完全版]_sibling_in_same_folder: WR (the base, non-完全版 title is the legacy variant)

rs_rules.description: Each raw row reports a 料率 (one of 35, 40, or 45). A title can mix multiple rate tiers across bookstores. The GT `rs` string is formed by sorting the unique rates ascending and joining them.
rs_rules.effective_rs_rate: max rate tier (used for the numeric rs_rate field)

known_wr_via_kanzen_sibling.description: TATE titles that have a sibling with '[完全版]' / '［完全版］' bracket tag get type=WR (they are the legacy variant). Listed here for traceability; the parser derives this dynamically from the TSV.
titles: サベージ・キャッスル～堕落の迷宮～【タテヨミ】
幼馴染のエロトラップ～発情した狼は甘すぎる～【タテヨミ】
融点～とけあい～【タテヨミ】

notes: Raw TSVs are UTF-8 despite docs sometimes claiming Shift-JIS.
Ends with a single blank row (empty 発行形態) — skipped on parse.
No rs numeric values were seen for 0.45 — top tier single-rate caps at 0.40 in this dataset.
